mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_notification_subscription( tenant_id, org_id, channel_id, name, enabled, device_group_key, event_types, filter_json, template_json, is_delete, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{channelId}, #{name}, #{enabled}, #{deviceGroupKey}, #{eventTypes}, #{filterJson}, #{templateJson}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS subscription_id, s.org_id AS subscription_org_id, s.device_group_key, s.event_types, s.filter_json, s.template_json, c.id AS channel_id, c.type AS channel_type, c.config_json AS channel_config_json FROM iot_notification_subscription s INNER JOIN iot_notification_channel c ON s.channel_id = c.id WHERE s.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND s.enabled = 1 AND c.enabled = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND c.is_delete = 0 AND s.device_group_key IN
#{gk}
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_notification_subscription SET channel_id = #{channelId}, name = #{name}, enabled = #{enabled}, device_group_key = #{deviceGroupKey}, event_types = #{eventTypes}, filter_json = #{filterJson}, template_json = #{templateJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
